name: Lacy Saffron Fritters with Pistachio & Dill Sugar Zoolbia

ingredients.item:
175g (6oz) plain flour
pinch of salt
1 x 7g (1/6 oz) sachet of fast-action dried yeast
250ml (9fl oz) warm water
75g (2¾oz) Greek yogurt
pinch of saffron threads, ground with a pestle and mortar, then dissolved in 2 tbsp boiling water
500ml (18fl oz) vegetable oil
ingredients.original:
175g (6oz) plain flour
pinch of salt
1 x 7g (1/6 oz) sachet of fast-action dried yeast
250ml (9fl oz) warm water
75g (2¾oz) Greek yogurt
pinch of saffron threads, ground with a pestle and mortar, then dissolved in 2 tbsp boiling water
500ml (18fl oz) vegetable oil

ingredients.item:
70g (2½oz) shelled pistachio nuts
good handful of dill, leaves picked and finely chopped
150g (5½oz) caster sugar
ingredients.original:
70g (2½oz) shelled pistachio nuts
good handful of dill, leaves picked and finely chopped
150g (5½oz) caster sugar
